CE1.justification: Agent acted directly without asking the user clarifying questions or requiring them to recall additional context.

CE2.justification: Response includes a lengthy trailing heads-up paragraph about blank Intent/Handoff fields and speculative project-folder scaffolding that pads beyond the task.

CE3.justification: Stated both where the entry went (decisions.md, not observations.md/daybook Log) and why (it constrains future implementation work), in one short clause.

CE4.justification: Each action (daybook create, decisions.md append) commits cleanly with cross-references, leaving no orphaned in-progress artifacts.
